prestazioni: N54B30A (3.0L twin-turbo V8) engine conversion with a custom-built Gintani N54 long-block featuring forged Mahle pistons (8.5:1 compression), Carrillo H-beam connecting rods, and a billet crankshaft, paired with a Pure Stage 2+ turbo kit (Garrett GTX3582R turbos, 1.08 A/R housings, and TiAL MV-R 44mm wastegates) for 650whp on E85 with a custom MHD flash (hybrid N54/N63 map) and a CSF N54 race intercooler

Dinan-engineered N54-specific Motec M150 ECU with full flex-fuel and ethanol content monitoring, integrated with a Vibrant 1799 dual-catch can system and a Radium Engineering fuel surge tank (2.5L capacity) feeding dual Walbro 450LPH in-tank pumps and a Fore Innovations F2000 fuel pressure regulator

KW Suspensions Clubsport coilovers (3-way adjustable, 800lb front/1000lb rear springs) with E60-specific camber plates, polyurethane subframe bushings (034 Motorsport), and a Hotchkis Sport sway bar kit (28mm front, 25mm rear) paired with OEM M5 rear subframe reinforcement and a custom-fabricated aluminum differential mount brace (Turner Motorsport)
estetica: Rocket Bunny V3 widebody kit (E60-specific, carbon fiber front fenders, rear quarter panels, and rear bumper) with custom extended rocker panels and a 3M Matte Graphite vinyl wrap over the entire body, including roof and mirrors

Vorsteiner V-FF 107 20x10 ET25 (front) and 20x11 ET30 (rear) forged wheels with Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 tires (275/30/20 front, 295/25/20 rear), paired with E60-specific H&R TRAK+ wheel spacers (15mm front, 20mm rear) for aggressive flush fitment

Custom M-Tech II front bumper lip (carbon fiber, extended 2 inches lower than OEM) with integrated LED DRLs (Lux H8 V4), a custom carbon fiber rear diffuser (Seibon) with dual 4-inch titanium exhaust tips (Remus Valvetronic), and a G-Power Hurricane RS carbon fiber hood (functional dual NACA ducts)
